PLAINTIFFS DO NOT PROVIDE ANY INFORMATION THAT MR. WILLIAMS' VARIOUS ILLNESSES, OR ANY OF THEM, ARE LIKELY TO WORSEN IN THE NEXT FEW MONTHS. HOWEVER, THE COURT WILL TREAT THE MOTION AS ONE TO SET A TRIAL DATE ON A NON-PREFERENCE BASIS ON THE EARLIEST DATE POSSIBLE AND, AS SO TREATED, GRANTS THE MOTION AND SETS A TRIAL DATE OF JUNE 20, 2011 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 220 AND PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE FILING OF SUMMARY MOTIONS ON 30 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING A SUMMARY MOTION IS JUNE 9, 2011. PLAINTIFFS TO MAKE DEMANDS ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN JUNE 2, 2011. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 603 ON JUNE 9, 2011 AT 1:30PM. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE DAY OF TRIAL. EXCHANGE OF PARED DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS IS 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. IF DEFENDANTS NEED TO SUBPOENA ONE OF THE BROTHERS OF THE PLAINTIFF WHO REFUSES TO COOPERATE AND TAKE HIS DEPOSITION THEN IT SHOULD BE DONE RIGHT NOW. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ALL OTHER SCHEDULING, DISCOVERY AND PRETRIAL ISSUES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND APPROVED AS TO FORM.
